'''Belorphyn''' was the ninth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]]. It was an inhospitable ice ball without moons with an oblong orbit (due to Serrata's influence). For a portion of its "year", it actually was closer to [[Deril]] than [[Serrata]].<ref name="PotG3" />

{{Planet-stub}}
